name: GH_WindowsFormUtil
summary: Exposes some static (Shared) utility functions for positioning custom windows.

methods.name: CenterFormOnCursor(Form, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnCursor(Form F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered around the cursor

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnCursor(Window, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnCursor(Window F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered around the cursor

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnEditor(Form, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnEditor(Form F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the active editor. If the editor doesn't exist or is hidden, the form will be centered on the screen instead.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnEditor(Window, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnEditor(Window F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the active editor. If the editor doesn't exist or is hidden, the form will be centered on the screen instead.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnScreen(Form, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnScreen(Form F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the current screen. The current screen being defined as the screen containing the cursor.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the active screen.

methods.name: CenterFormOnScreen(Window, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnScreen(Window F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the current screen. The current screen being defined as the screen containing the cursor.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the active screen.

methods.name: CenterFormOnWindow(Form, Form, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnWindow(Form F, Form parentWindow, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the supplied window. If the window doesn't exist or is hidden, the form will be centered on the screen instead.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnWindow(Window, Window, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnWindow(Window F, Window parentWindow, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the supplied window. If the window doesn't exist or is hidden, the form will be centered on the screen instead.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.
